title: Epic Lucky Blocks
description: Adds a lucky block that drops a random drop when destroyed.
body:
-Adds 100 random drops from new structures to new items between normal drops.

-Adds a lucky block that drops a random drop when destroyed.

-There are negative and positive drops.

-You have to be in survival for something to come up, otherwise nothing will come up.

-Donate [https://ko-fi.com/ksavio](https://ko-fi.com/ksavio)

![ALL](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7eb9b71e7dcc533161c07b691ed68044efa38559_0.webp)
